org.apache.flink.runtime.deployment

## Class TaskDeploymentDescriptor

  * [java.lang.Object](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/Object.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")
  *     * org.apache.flink.runtime.deployment.TaskDeploymentDescriptor

    [Serializable](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/io/Serializable.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")

* * *




        public final class TaskDeploymentDescriptor
        extends [Object](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/Object.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")
        implements [Serializable](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/io/Serializable.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")

A task deployment descriptor contains all the information necessary to deploy a task on a task manager.

See Also:
    [Serialized Form](<../../../../../serialized-form.html#org.apache.flink.runtime.deployment.TaskDeploymentDescriptor>)

      * #### getSerializedJobInformation

            public [SerializedValue](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/util/SerializedValue.html> "class in org.apache.flink.util")<[JobInformation](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/executiongraph/JobInformation.html> "class in org.apache.flink.runtime.executiongraph")> getSerializedJobInformation()

Return the sub task's serialized job information.

Returns:
    serialized job information (may throw [`IllegalStateException`](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/IllegalStateException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang") if [`loadBigData(PermanentBlobService)`](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/deployment/TaskDeploymentDescriptor.html#loadBigData-org.apache.flink.runtime.blob.PermanentBlobService->) is not called beforehand).
Throws:
    `[IllegalStateException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/IllegalStateException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")` \- If job information is offloaded to BLOB store.

      * #### loadBigData

            public void loadBigData([@Nullable](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/javax/annotation/Nullable.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in javax.annotation")
                                    [PermanentBlobService](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/blob/PermanentBlobService.html> "interface in org.apache.flink.runtime.blob") blobService)
                             throws [IOException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/io/IOException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io"),
                                    [ClassNotFoundException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/ClassNotFoundException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")

Loads externalized data from the BLOB store back to the object.

Parameters:
    `blobService` \- the blob store to use (may be `null` if [`serializedJobInformation`](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/deployment/TaskDeploymentDescriptor.html#serializedJobInformation>) and [`serializedTaskInformation`](<../../../../../org/apache/flink/runtime/deployment/TaskDeploymentDescriptor.html#serializedTaskInformation>) are non-`null`)
Throws:
    `[IOException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/io/IOException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.io")` \- during errors retrieving or reading the BLOBs
    `[ClassNotFoundException](<http://docs.oracle.com/javase/7/docs/api/java/lang/ClassNotFoundException.html?is-external=true> "class or interface in java.lang")` \- Class of a serialized object cannot be found.
